milestones.title: First Control: The Journey Begins
milestones.description: First gameplay: Players take control of Arthur Morgan for the first time, following Dutch van der Linde through a blizzard toward the abandoned mining town of Colter.

milestones.title: Arrival at Adler Ranch
milestones.description: New Area: The gang arrives at an O'Driscoll hideout (Adler Ranch). Dutch attempts to negotiate, setting the stage for the first conflict.

milestones.title: First Gunfight
milestones.description: Combat Tutorial: Negotiations fail, triggering the first shootout. Players learn aiming and cover mechanics while defeating O'Driscoll members.

milestones.title: Looting Supplies
milestones.description: Item Acquisition: Arthur enters the cabin to search for supplies. This teaches the looting mechanic, providing essential consumables like food and medicine.

milestones.title: Barn Ambush & Interrogation
milestones.description: Melee & Choice: While investigating the barn, Arthur is ambushed by a hiding O'Driscoll. Players engage in their first melee fight and make their first moral choice (spare or kill).

milestones.title: Meeting Sadie Adler
milestones.description: New Character: Arthur discovers the widow Sadie Adler in the ranch basement. This is a pivotal story moment introducing a key supporting character.

milestones.title: Mission Complete: Outlaws from the West
milestones.description: Level Completion: The group returns to Colter. The mission ends, displaying medal rankings and completion stats for the first Chapter 1 mission.

milestones.title: Mission Start: Enter, Pursued by a Memory
milestones.description: New Mission: Abigail asks Arthur to find John Marston. Arthur sets out into the snowy mountains with Javier Escuella, marking the start of the second main mission.

milestones.title: Wolf Encounter
milestones.description: Enemy Encounter: While tracking John's horse, Arthur and Javier are attacked by a wolf pack. Players must use the Sawed-off Shotgun for self-defense while riding.

milestones.title: Finding John Marston
milestones.description: Key Step: Arthur and Javier find an injured John Marston trapped on a snow-covered cliffside, completing the search phase of the mission.
